[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces used [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] '''''CUV18f1''''' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Transport ''CUV18f1'' reloaded warheads for essential [[TIE starfighter]]s attacking the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] [[Warhawk (MC40a light cruiser)|''Warhawk'']] and the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']] at the [[Treachery at Ottega]].
